publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-15 23:49:01 -0500.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection contains course material, notes, articles, lecture notes, correspondence, publications.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Richard White papers, #16-4-4336. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Professor of Civil Engineering. Born in 1933, White joined the faculty of Cornell University in 1961, the same year that he finished his Ph.D. He taught at Cornell until his retirement in 1999, serving as Director of Cornell's School of Civil and Environmental Engineering from 1978-1984. Even after his retirement, he remained active in CEE until 2005. He died in 2009.

controlaccess.subject: Civil engineering.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. College of Civil Engineering
